message:
fix: assorted correctness fixes across runtime, wait, pane state, and scrollback

- runtime: check adopt_uuid() return value, skip on registry collision
- build_coord: handle toolchain overrides (+nightly) and global flags
  before cargo subcommand
- wait: fix QueueDepthGauge::decrement TOCTOU with CAS loop, use
  saturating_add in ActivityTracker::mark
- agent_pane_state: remove premature Idle fallback, keep Active when
  output is recent
- scrollback_tiers: saturating_sub in evict_warm_page to prevent underflow
- backup: correct doc comment about non-atomic backup behavior
- vendored_async_contracts: update coverage semantics doc and test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
